name: WeatherAPI
description: WeatherAPI provides real-time and forecast weather data, astronomy data, time zone information, and location search for any place in the world. The API supports current conditions, multi-day forecasts up to 14 days, historical weather, air quality, marine weather, and sports suitability data.

capabilities.name: get_current_weather
capabilities.description: Get real-time weather conditions for a location including temperature, wind, humidity, pressure, visibility, UV index, and air quality.

capabilities.name: get_forecast
capabilities.description: Get a weather forecast for up to 14 days with hourly breakdowns, including temperature, precipitation chance, wind, and daily summaries.

capabilities.name: search_location
capabilities.description: Search for locations by name with autocomplete support. Returns matching cities with their coordinates, country, and region.

capabilities.name: get_astronomy
capabilities.description: Get astronomical data for a location including sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, moon phase, and moon illumination.

capabilities.name: get_history
capabilities.description: Retrieve historical weather data for a specific past date, including hourly conditions throughout that day.

capabilities.name: get_timezone
capabilities.description: Get the current time zone and local time for any location worldwide, including UTC offset and whether daylight saving time is active.
